name: Soleil Solar
tagline: Engineer-owned solar, built to last in Sonoma County
seoDescription: Soleil Solar & Engineering: engineer-owned solar PV, battery backup and electrical in Santa Rosa, Petaluma & Sonoma. NABCEP certified, 3,000+ systems installed.

sections.heading: Solar designed by an engineer, installed by a master electrician
sections.subheading: Owner Nick Soleil has designed and managed 3,000+ PV systems and 500+ battery backups across Northern California — a small, hands-on team that keeps overhead low and quality high.

sections.heading: About Soleil Solar
body: Soleil Solar & Engineering is owned by Nick Soleil, an electrical engineer and California master electrician who has spent more than 19 years designing, managing, and installing solar power systems. Nick began installing PV in the 1990s — powering off-grid homes, cabins, and RVs with battery backup, generator, and solar water-pumping systems before grid-tied solar existed — and spent over six years as a Field Application Engineer at Enphase Energy.

Based in the Santa Rosa area, Soleil is a small, engineer-led shop that keeps overhead low to pass savings on to customers. The team has designed and installed more than 3,000 solar PV systems and 500+ battery backup systems, and is a NABCEP-certified solar installation company. They serve Santa Rosa, Petaluma, Sonoma, and communities throughout Northern California.

items.title: Residential Solar PV Installation
items.description: Custom-designed rooftop and ground-mount solar systems for homes, engineered by a licensed electrical engineer and installed by a master electrician for clean, long-lasting power.

items.title: Battery Storage & Backup
items.description: Energy storage and whole-home backup including Tesla Powerwall, so your home stays powered through PG&E outages and PSPS shutoffs. 500+ battery systems installed.

items.title: Microinverters & AC Modules
items.description: Enphase microinverter and AC-module systems — a specialty drawn from Nick's years as an Enphase Field Application Engineer — for higher production and module-level monitoring.

items.title: Off-Grid & Standalone Power
items.description: Off-grid PV, generator, and solar water-pumping systems for homes, cabins, and remote properties, building on decades of off-grid experience.

items.title: Solar Service & Repair
items.description: Servicing, troubleshooting, and repair of existing solar arrays and inverters across Northern California — useful when an original installer is no longer around.

items.title: Electrical Contracting & Engineering
items.description: Licensed electrical contracting and engineering, including main-panel upgrades and system design, backed by master-electrician credentials in CA, TX, and LA.

sections.heading: Work with Soleil Solar
sections.body: Find us at 3928 New Zealand Ave. Call (707) 321-2937 — we’re glad to help.
